ERR.DELETED: This account was deleted and can no longer be used.
ERR.CONFIRM_EMAIL: Account created: confirm your email or disable "Confirm email" in Supabase

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings

PAYLOAD.NO_CHANGES: No changes — nothing will be sent

CONFIRM.OVERWRITE_CLOUD:
The cloud has a MORE RECENT save (saved on {{when}}, probably from another device).

If you continue, you'll overwrite it with this save and lose that progress. Overwrite?
CONFIRM.DELETE_ACCOUNT: Delete your Supabase account? You will no longer be able to sign in with it. This action cannot be undone.
CONFIRM.DELETE_ACCOUNT_ERROR: Could not delete the account. Check your connection and try again.
CONFIRM.RESET_EXPLORATION: Reset ALL Exploration Mode progress? You'll lose your stars, purchased upgrades and weapons, and maps will be re-locked. You'll start from scratch. This action cannot be undone.

LINK.TITLE: Link your email
LINK.DESC: You're playing as a guest. Link an email so you don't lose your progress and can log in from another device.
LINK.OK: Email linked ✓ — your account is now permanent.

ERR.SHORT_PASSWORD: Password must be at least 6 characters
ERR.EMAIL_TAKEN: That email already has an account. Use a different one.

SETTINGS.MUTE_DESC: Turns off all music and effects.

GAME_SETTINGS.SHOW_JOYSTICK_DESC: Visual only: touch movement works the same
GAME_SETTINGS.SHOW_FPS_DESC: Overlay with FPS, worst frame and enemy count to diagnose stutters
GAME_SETTINGS.SCREEN_SHAKE_DESC: Camera shake and flashes when hitting/taking damage. Turn off if it bothers you in long sessions
GAME_SETTINGS.PARALLAX_DESC: Moving background behind the map (applies instantly)
GAME_SETTINGS.CAMERA_BOUNDS_DESC: The camera stops at the map edge and hides the void. Turn off for free follow.

NODE.FORGE_DESC: Unlocks the upgrades tab in forges.
NODE.AUTO_ATTACK_DESC: Enables auto-attack (the ∞ HUD button). While locked, the button is hidden.
NODE.SKILL_SLOT_DESC: Unlocks HUD skill slot {{n}}. While locked, it is hidden.
NODE.AUTO_SKILLS_DESC: Automatically casts your HUD skills when they are ready.

EQUIP_SET_2.NAME: Equipment set II
EQUIP_SET_2.DESC: Unlocks a second switchable equipment set, for ALL your characters.

EQUIP_SET_3.NAME: Equipment set III
EQUIP_SET_3.DESC: Unlocks a third switchable equipment set, for ALL your characters. Requires set II.

INVENTORY.CONFIRM_DELETE: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.

DEATHS_10.NAME: Occasionally Immortal
DEATHS_10.DESC: Die 10 times. Happens to the best of us.

GKILLS_1000.NAME: Plague
GKILLS_1000.DESC: Kill 1000 enemies across all your characters.

GKILLS_10000.NAME: Apocalypse
GKILLS_10000.DESC: Kill 10,000 enemies across all your characters.

QUESTS.NONE_COMPLETED: You haven't completed any quests yet.

PRIMERAS_ESTRELLAS.NAME: Mordekai's Call
PRIMERAS_ESTRELLAS.DESC: Mordekai asks you to learn to explore before fighting. Cross the exploration portal (the east one) and gather 100 stars: tap the screen to jump and grab them on the fly. Reward: 10 gold.

MATA_RATA.NAME: Hatchet Rat
MATA_RATA.DESC: Mordekai wants you to try steel. Head back to exploration and take down 1 hatchet rat, the ground enemy scurrying along the floor.

PLAGA_BABOSAS.NAME: Slime Plague
PLAGA_BABOSAS.DESC: Something stirs in the grass. Take down your first enemy.

KILL_50.NAME: Rookie Hunter
KILL_50.DESC: Prove your worth by defeating 50 enemies of any kind.

ORCS_5.NAME: Orc Cleanup
ORCS_5.DESC: Orcs prowl the area. Cut down 5 of them.

PET.BIND_MESSAGE: Do you want to bind {{pet}} to {{char}}? It will only be equippable on this character.

BUILD.TITLE: Build
BUILD.DELETE_WARN: This is permanent. Everything stored inside will be lost too.
BUILD.SELL_HINT: Drag items from your bag here to sell them.

RUN.MS_SPRINT_DESC: Sprint attack: run faster while exploring.
RUN.MS_ENEMIES_DESC: Ground enemies appear while exploring: slay them for stars.
RUN.MS_SARDINE_DESC: +2% passive star production per second (weapons and generators).
RUN.MS_MONEDAKO_DESC: Every coin you pick up gives +500 extra gold.
RUN.MS_NARANJA_DESC: Every coin you pick up gives extra gold equal to 10% of your current stars/sec.
RUN.MS_INFLACION_DESC: Every coin you pick up grants stars equal to 20% of your current stars/sec.
RUN.MS_FLYING_DESC: Flying enemies appear: more danger, more stars.
RUN.MS_RANDOMBOX_DESC: Floating "?" boxes appear: jump and hit them from below for a random reward (stars, star rain…).
RUN.MS_DJUMP_DESC: Jump again mid-air (tap again while jumping).
RUN.MS_DASH_DESC: Swipe right (or D/→): an invulnerable burst that mows down enemies.
RUN.MS_SLAM_DESC: Swipe down mid-air (or S/↓): dive down and the shockwave kills nearby enemies.
RUN.MS_BOW_DESC: Auto-fires arrows every few seconds, sweeping enemies ahead at your height.
RUN.MS_MAGNET1_DESC: Nearby stars and hearts fly to you.
RUN.MS_STARVAL_DESC: +1 star per star collected or enemy slain.
RUN.MS_SURGE_DESC: Each star you collect also grants 25% of your current stars per second.
RUN.MS_ARROWS2_DESC: The bow fires a second low arrow that sweeps the ground.
RUN.MS_REVIVE_DESC: Once per run, a killing blow leaves you at 50% health instead.
RUN.MS_BOOST_DESC: Boost button: 10s of ×5 speed, invulnerable and mowing down enemies, with aura.
RUN.MS_HEARTS_DESC: Hearts appear while exploring: heal when you pick them up.
RUN.MS_PROD1_DESC: Generates +6 ★ per minute while exploring (AFK too).
RUN.MS_PROD2_DESC: Generates +18 more ★ per minute while exploring (AFK too).
RUN.MS_PROD3_DESC: Generates +36 more ★ per minute while exploring (AFK too).
RUN.MS_MAP_DESC: Unlocks the map so you can travel to it from the world map.
RUN.GO_HOME_MSG: Are you sure you want to return home?
RUN.GO_HOME_WARN: You'll lose this expedition's progress: current distance resets (stars are kept).
RUN.DEATH_MSG: You return to the planet's main city.

CHAT.TITLE: Chat
CHAT.EMPTY: You haven't talked to anyone yet.

NPC.RECRUIT_GREETING: Hey {{player}}, how's it going? From now on you can pick me to play with.
NPC.MORDEKAI_DONE: When you feel like real fighting, {{player}}, cross the west portal to 1-1. The first monsters await you there.
NPC.MORDEKAI_CLAIM: You got your star, {{player}}! Now you know how to move out there. Take this and head to the west portal, to 1-1: time to wield steel.
NPC.MORDEKAI_CLAIM1: Well done, bro! Now kill 1 hatchet rat. You'll spot them out in exploration, scurrying along the ground.
NPC.MORDEKAI_PROGRESS: You have {{prog}}/{{goal}} stars. Keep jumping for them in exploration (east portal).
NPC.MORDEKAI_INTRO: Welcome to Asgard, {{player}}. I am Mordekai. Before fighting, learn to explore: cross the east portal and bring back 1 star. Tap the screen to jump and grab it on the fly.
NPC.RAKE_LINE: {{player}}, we set off whenever you want.

MAP_UPGRADES.TITLE: Map upgrades
MAP_UPGRADES.NONE_DONE: You haven't completed any upgrade yet.

UNLOCK_ELITE.NAME: Unlock Elite
UNLOCK_ELITE.DESC: Lets Elite enemies appear on this map.

MAX_ENEMIES.NAME: Max enemies
MAX_ENEMIES.DESC: Increases the max number of enemies at once.

ORE.NAME: Max ores
ORE.DESC: Raises the max ores at once by 1.

UNLOCK_GEM.NAME: Unlock gems
UNLOCK_GEM.DESC: Lets gems appear (max 1 at once) on this map.

GEM_RESPAWN_MIN.NAME: Gem min respawn
GEM_RESPAWN_MIN.DESC: Reduces the MINIMUM gem respawn time by 10s.

GEM_RESPAWN_MAX.NAME: Gem max respawn
GEM_RESPAWN_MAX.DESC: Reduces the MAXIMUM gem respawn time by 10s.

TREE_MAX.NAME: Max trees
TREE_MAX.DESC: Raises the max trees at once by 1.

UNLOCK_RABBIT.NAME: Unlock rabbits
UNLOCK_RABBIT.DESC: Lets rabbits appear on this map.
